AM-Kanye-Rest.name: AM-Kanye-Rest
AM-Kanye-Rest.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="AM-Kanye-Rest">
    <DisplayName>AM-Kanye-Rest</DisplayName>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="response"/>
    <Set>
        <Payload contentType="application/json">{super-secret-email}</Payload>
        <!--        <Headers>
            <Header name="fake-header">{super-secret-email}</Header>
        </Headers>
-->
    </Set>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
</AssignMessage>

GetKVM.name: GetKVM
GetKVM.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="kanye-rest-header" async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="GetKVM">
    <DisplayName>GetKVM</DisplayName>
    <ExpiryTimeInSecs>86400</ExpiryTimeInSecs>
    <Scope>environment</Scope>
    <Get assignTo="private.super-secret-email">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>fake-header</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

ProcessEncryptedValue.name: ProcessEncryptedValue
ProcessEncryptedValue.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" timeLimit="200" name="ProcessEncryptedValue">
    <DisplayName>Process Encrypted Value</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ResourceURL>jsc://processEncryptedValue.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript>

remove-query-param-apikey.name: remove-query-param-apikey
remove-query-param-apikey.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="remove-query-param-apikey">
    <DisplayName>Remove Query Param apikey</DisplayName>
    <Remove>
        <QueryParams>
            <QueryParam name="apikey"/>
        </QueryParams>
       </Remove>
   <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
   <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="request"/>
</AssignMessage>

verify-api-key.name: verify-api-key
verify-api-key.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<VerifyAPIKey async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="verify-api-key">
    <DisplayName>Verify API Key</DisplayName>
    <APIKey ref="request.queryparam.apikey"/>
</VerifyAPIKey>
